profile_backing.full_profile_command: rch exec -- cargo bench -p fj-lax --bench lax_baseline -- --noplot --sample-size 10 --warm-up-time 1 --measurement-time 2

focused_baseline.command: rch exec -- cargo bench -p fj-lax --bench lax_baseline -- linalg/matmul_2d_512x512x512_f64 --noplot --sample-size 10 --warm-up-time 1 --measurement-time 2

candidate.lever: one-row col8 register accumulator for matmul_2d
candidate.description: For n>=8, accumulated eight output columns in scalar locals across the full ascending-k loop and stored each output cell once; scalar tail handled non-multiple-of-eight columns.

rebench.command: rch exec -- cargo bench -p fj-lax --bench lax_baseline -- linalg/matmul_2d_512x512x512_f64 --noplot --sample-size 10 --warm-up-time 1 --measurement-time 2

isomorphism_proof.ordering: Candidate preserved row-major output and the same per-cell l=0..k-1 contribution order.
isomorphism_proof.tie_breaking: N/A: GEMM has no comparison or tie-breaking behavior.
isomorphism_proof.floating_point: Candidate used the same scalar multiplication and addition sequence per output cell; no FMA, reassociation, partial-sum merge, SIMD reduction, or mixed precision was introduced.
isomorphism_proof.rng: N/A: matmul_2d consumes no random state.
isomorphism_proof.errors: No public error path changed in candidate state; slice indexing stayed in matmul_2d.

validation.result: pass before and after candidate restore

validation.command: rch exec -- cargo test -p fj-lax matmul_2d -- --nocapture
validation.details: 3 tests passed, including adversarial NaN/signed-zero bit-pattern test

alien_source.applied_slice: Tried a register-local one-row column tile after prior row-block, transpose, row-parallel, and SIMD levers failed.

next_primitive.target: recursive/cache-oblivious GEMM or packed-B panel with explicit per-cell ascending-k proof
next_primitive.reason: The col8 register-local schedule improved C write locality but destroyed B traversal locality and regressed sharply. The next attempt should improve B reuse without switching to strided-B column walks.
